evidence: standards/enterprise/modern-testing.md, ADR-0011, and the final joined AI consistency review
exception_policy: A temporary accessibility-test gap requires the exact semantics or interaction, affected users, alternate evidence, Accessibility Owner, expiry, and remediation plan.
statement: Accessibility semantics, focus and order, scalable content, reduced-motion behavior, and alternate-input behavior MUST be tested at the cheapest layer that can falsify each applicable obligation.
